notes: No lang/pages/**/sw.json page packs exist, so build-i18n validates global UI keys but cannot regenerate the Swahili page corpus from structured page translations.
scripts/build-i18n.js treats existing /sw/ pages as hand-crafted pages and maps them to English where a direct or explicit source exists.
Country subpages and repeated calculator families look like scripted or copied outputs; core shell/category hubs are the practical hand-authored source layer.

completionEstimate.interpretation: Raw route presence is around the mid-teens, paired coverage is lower, registry discoverability is tiny, and structured page-pack coverage is zero. Treat Swahili as partially present but not yet a durable whole-site localization surface.

buildI18nDryRun.note: existing-sw is lower than raw swHtml because build-i18n stores mappings in a Map keyed by English source or _swonly path, so duplicate/colliding mappings collapse.

buildI18nValidate.summary: [fr], [sw], [yo], and [ha] all match en.json global key parity.

validateHreflang.summary: No fatal hreflang errors, but broad non-bidirectional warning debt remains. Sw-related warnings are a minority of total warning lines and are baseline repo debt in this no-fix audit.
